actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},
thanks for reaching out.
Can you please try to resync your wallet?

From the Assets list, open the wallet, tap the three vertical dots upper right, click resync and confirm, than wait a few seconds.

If this doesn't work try force close the app, open it and wait till the green circle around the wallet has gone.

Then check again.

Also, be sure to have the latest version of the app.

Please let me know.
